name: Vegetable Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cheese sauce first. In a skillet, melt tablespoons of butter over low heat.
2. Turn the heat up to high and add flour, blending into a smooth paste.
3. Add salt, nutmeg, white pepper, and blend well.
4. Add milk and parmesan, stirring until the cheese melts smoothly. Remove from heat.
5. Cheese filling: In another bowl, mix ricotta, beaten eggs, grated mozzarella cheese, and dried parsley. Mix well.
6. Vegetables: In a skillet at high heat, add some olive oil and sauté the chopped shallots for a few minutes. Reduce to medium heat and add the chopped vegetables (except tomato), stirring occasionally until cooked uncovered for about 10 minutes.
7. Cook the lasagna noodles according to directions, rinse, and set aside to cool.
8. Grease a deep casserole dish.
9. Put a little of the cheese sauce on the bottom, then layer with three or four noodles.
10. Next, layer with cheese sauce, then cheese filling, followed by vegetables.
11. Top with a few slices of raw tomato. Repeat layers three times. You can leave off the top layer of tomato if you want a browner cheese topping.
12. Bake in a 350 degree oven for about 35 minutes.
